questionHtml:
An ideal gas expands isothermally. The work done by the gas is 100 J. What is the change in the internal energy of the gas?


A.  −100 J

B.  0

C.  +50 J

D.  +100 J

meta.title: An ideal gas expands isothermally. The work done by the gas is 100 J. What is the change in the internal energy of the gas? A. −100 J B. 0 C. +50 J D. +100 J
breadcrumbLabels: B. The particulate nature of matter
B. The particulate nature of matter
